Home/Support

Customer Support

Need help with a product, an order, billing, payment, or an issue with something you received? Contact us and we will route it to the right person.

Product Support

Product & Application Questions

Questions about hose, fittings, compatibility, sizing, specifications, or product selection.

Email Product Support →
Order Help

Order & Delivery Questions

Check on an order, discuss availability, provide order details, or ask about delivery and pickup.

Email Order Support →
Account Help

Billing & Payment Questions

Ask about invoices, account records, payment questions, tax documentation, or account information.

Email Billing Support →
Order Issue

Returns & Order Issues

Let us know about an incorrect item, damage, a return request, or any concern with an order.

Report an Issue →
Talk to Us

Prefer to speak with someone?

Call during business hours for product support or urgent order questions. For non-urgent requests, email us with your company name, contact information, and any order or invoice number that applies.

Call 734.486.6473sales@cpspecialtyproducts.com
